\tzpentry{ID5509}{Document Phase Angle Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5509 introduces Document Phase Angle Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot\theta=\omega+K_1\sin(\phi-\theta)+K_{32}\sin(2\phi-3\theta)-\Gamma(\dot\theta-\dot\phi). \label{eq:spin_orbit} \end{equation}
